content.text:
python3 << 'PYEOF'
[?2004l[?2004hcontent = """parser grammar SYsUParser;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hoptions {
[?2004l[?2004h  tokenVocab=SYsULexer;
[?2004l[?2004h}
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hprimaryExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   Identifier
[?2004l[?2004h    |   Constant
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hpostfixExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   primaryExpression  
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hunaryExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :
[?2004l[?2004h    (postfixExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    |   unaryOperator unaryExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    )
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hunaryOperator
[?2004l[?2004h    :   Plus | Minus
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hadditiveExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   unaryExpression ((Plus|Minus) unaryExpression)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hassignmentExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   additiveExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    |   unaryExpression Equal assignmentExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hexpression
[?2004l[?2004h    :   assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hdeclaration
[?2004l[?2004h    :   declarationSpecifiers initDeclaratorList? Semi
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hdeclarationSpecifiers
[?2004l[?2004h    :   declarationSpecifier+
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hdeclarationSpecifier
[?2004l[?2004h    :   typeSpecifier typeQualifier? initDeclaratorList? Semi
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hdeclarationSpecifier
[?2004l[?2004h    :   typeSpecifier
[?2004l[?2004h    |   typeQualifier
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hinitDeclaratorList
[?2004l[?2004h    :   initDeclarator (Comma initDeclarator)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hinitDeclarator
[?2004l[?2004h    :   declarator (Equal initializer)?
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004htypeSpecifier
[?2004l[?2004h    :   Int
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004htypeQualifier
[?2004l[?2004h    :   Const
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hdeclarator
[?2004l[?2004h    :   directDeclarator
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hdirectDeclarator
[?2004l[?2004h    :   Identifier
[?2004l[?2004h    |   directDeclarator LeftBracket assignmentExpression? RightBracket
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hidentifierList
[?2004l[?2004h    :   Identifier (Comma Identifier)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hinitializer
[?2004l[?2004h    :   assignmentExpression
[?2004l[?2004h    |   LeftBrace initializerList? Comma? RightBrace
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hinitializerList
[?2004l[?2004h    :   initializer (Comma initializer)*
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hstatement
[?2004l[?2004h    :   compoundStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    |   expressionStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    |   jumpStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hcompoundStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    :   LeftBrace blockItemList? RightBrace
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hblockItemList
[?2004l[?2004h    :   blockItem+
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hblockItem
[?2004l[?2004h    :   statement
[?2004l[?2004h    |   declaration
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hexpressionStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    :   expression? Semi
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hjumpStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    :   (Return expression?)
[?2004l[?2004h    Semi
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hcompilationUnit
[?2004l[?2004h    :   translationUnit? EOF
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004htranslationUnit
[?2004l[?2004h    :   externalDeclaration+
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hexternalDeclaration
[?2004l[?2004h    :   functionDefinition
[?2004l[?2004h    |   declaration
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h[?2004l[?2004hfunctionDefinition
[?2004l[?2004h    : declarationSpecifiers directDeclarator LeftParen RightParen compoundStatement
[?2004l[?2004h    ;
[?2004l[?2004h"""
[?2004l[?2004hwith open('/workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4', 'w') as f:
[?2004l[?2004h    f.write(content)
[?2004l[?2004hprint('Done')
[?2004l[?2004hPYEOF
[?2004lDone
[?2004h
